zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster於大約1045年出生在法國諾門迪可騰時，他的父親William Moyon31歲，母親Adeliza42歲。他於1060年之前與Adeline de Ponthieu結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1066年登記服兵役。他於1086年在英國薩默塞特登斯特被列為sheriff of somerset。他去世於1100年在英國薩默塞特登斯特享年56歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特巴斯 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster于大约1045年出生在法国諾門迪可騰时，他的父亲William Moyon31岁，母亲Adeliza42岁。他于1060年之前与Adeline de Ponthieu结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1066年登记服兵役。他于1086年在英国薩默塞特登斯特被列为sheriff of somerset。他去世于1100年在英国薩默塞特登斯特享年56岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特巴斯 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster was born about 1045, in Cotentin, Normandy, France, his father, William Moyon, was 31 and his mother, Adeliza, was 42. He married Adeline de Ponthieu before 1060. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He registered for military service in 1066. In 1086, at the age of 42, his occupation is listed as sheriff of somerset in Dunster, Somerset, England. He died in 1100, in Dunster, Somerset, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Bath Abbey, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster est né environ 1045, à Cotentin, Normandie, France, son père, William Moyon, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adeliza, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Adeline de Ponthieu avant 1060. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. En 1086, à l’âge de 42 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of somerset à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1100, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Bath Abbey, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster um 1045 in Cotentin, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Moyon 31 und seine Mutter Adeliza 42. Er hat vor 1060 Adeline de Ponthieu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1086, als er 42 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of somerset in Dunster, Somerset, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1100 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Dunster, Somerset, England und wurde in Bath Abbey, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster è nato il circa 1045 nel Cotentin, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, William Moyon, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Adeline de Ponthieu prima del 1060. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Nel 1086, all'età di 42 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of somerset nel Dunster, Somerset, England. Morì nel 1100, nel Dunster, Somerset, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Bath Abbey, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunsterが約1045年にフランスノーマンディコテンティンで生まれた時，父William Moyonは31歳，母Adelizaは42歳であった。1060年以前にAdeline de Ponthieuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。1086年，42歳の時，イギリスソメルセトダンスターでの職業はsheriff of somersetと記録されている。彼は1100年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで56歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトバス アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster(이)가 대략 1045년 프랑스 노먼디 컷틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Moyon(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1060년 이전 Adeline de Ponthieu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1086년, 42세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 sheriff of somerset이었다. 그는 1100년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 바스 애브브이에 묻혔다.

mn.Dunster Castle, Somersetshire, England: Dunster, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Bath Abbey, Somerset, England: Bath Abbey, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster nasceu aproximadamente 1045, em Cotentin, Normandie, França, seu pai, William Moyon, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Adeline de Ponthieu antes 1060. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Em 1086, com 42 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of somerset em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1100, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Bath Abbey, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster родился около 1045 г. в местности котентинь, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени William Moyon было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adeliza, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeline de Ponthieu перед 1060 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1086 году, в возрасте 42 лет, работал по профессии sheriff of somerset в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия. Он умер в 1100 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности бат эбби, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Mohun 1st Feudal Baron of Dunster nació aproximadamente 1045, en Cotentin, Normandie, Francia, su papá, William Moyon, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adeliza, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Adeline de Ponthieu antes de 1060. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. En 1086, a la edad de 42 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of somerset en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra. Murió en 1100, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Bath Abbey, Somerset, Inglaterra.
